category_sources: source_facts.description says Source code analyzer for Java, JavaScript, and more; official README calls PMD an extensible multilanguage static code analyzer.
display_name_sources: Official README and documentation use the display name PMD.
docs_sources: Official README points to https://docs.pmd-code.org/latest/; official documentation index is also available on pmd.github.io.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/pmd/pmd, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe multilanguage static analysis, rules, CLI usage, Java, JavaScript, and code quality checks.
